scripts.uat:backlog: npm run uat:intense && node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');const cp=require('node:child_process');const candidates=['scripts/uat/generate-master-backlog.mjs','scripts/uat/generate-backlog.js','scripts/uat/generate-backlog.mjs','scripts/uat/generate_backlog.js','scripts/uat/generate_backlog.mjs','scripts/uat/backlog-generator.js','scripts/uat/backlog-generator.mjs','scripts/uat/generateUatBacklog.js','scripts/uat/generateUatBacklog.mjs'];const target=candidates.find((p)=>fs.existsSync(p));if(!target){console.error('No UAT backlog generator script found under scripts/uat.');process.exit(1);}const r=cp.spawnSync(process.execPath,[target],{stdio:'inherit'});process.exit(r.status??1);"
